description: Production monitoring and post-migration validation checklist for MonthlyRevenue releaseDate migration

checklistItems.label: MonthlyRevenue releaseDate field exists post-migration
checklistItems.validationQuery: PRAGMA table_info(MonthlyRevenue) — releaseDate column must be present
checklistItems.expectedResult: Column releaseDate present with type DateTime (nullable)

checklistItems.label: releaseDateSource field exists post-migration
checklistItems.validationQuery: PRAGMA table_info(MonthlyRevenue) — releaseDateSource column must be present
checklistItems.expectedResult: Column releaseDateSource present with type String (nullable)

checklistItems.label: releaseDateConfidence field exists post-migration
checklistItems.validationQuery: PRAGMA table_info(MonthlyRevenue) — releaseDateConfidence column must be present
checklistItems.expectedResult: Column releaseDateConfidence present with type String (nullable)

checklistItems.label: Records with missing releaseDate counted and tracked
checklistItems.validationQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MonthlyRevenue WHERE releaseDate IS NULL
checklistItems.expectedResult: Count logged. Acceptable threshold: < 5% of total rows (or per ops policy)

checklistItems.label: INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH releaseDate rows counted
checklistItems.validationQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MonthlyRevenue WHERE releaseDateSource = 'INFERRED_NEXT_MONTH_10TH'
checklistItems.expectedResult: Count logged and consistent with P18 backfill expectation

checklistItems.label: Authoritative / EXPLICIT releaseDate rows counted
checklistItems.validationQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MonthlyRevenue WHERE releaseDateSource = 'EXPLICIT'

checklistItems.label: Invalid releaseDate rows counted (future dates or null where mandatory)
checklistItems.validationQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MonthlyRevenue WHERE releaseDate > CURRENT_DATE
checklistItems.expectedResult: Must be 0 — no future releaseDate values allowed

checklistItems.label: Query gate smoke: releaseDate <= asOfDate sample validation
checklistItems.validationQuery: Sample validation: for 100 random MonthlyRevenue rows, verify releaseDate <= asOfDate. Zero violations required.

checklistItems.label: RuleBasedStockAnalyzer smoke validation (no error)
checklistItems.expectedResult: Smoke test exits without error; no releaseDate-related exception

checklistItems.label: FundamentalResearchService smoke validation (no error)
checklistItems.expectedResult: Smoke test exits without error; releaseDate field accessible

checklistItems.label: ActiveScoringSnapshot smoke validation (no error)
checklistItems.expectedResult: Smoke test exits without error; PIT guard active and leakage-free

checklistItems.label: Rollback readiness validation — backup file still accessible
checklistItems.expectedResult: Backup file exists and checksum matches recorded value

checklistItems.label: Post-migration no-leakage check — 0 rows with releaseDate > asOfDate
checklistItems.validationQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MonthlyRevenue WHERE releaseDate > asOfDate
checklistItems.expectedResult: Count must be 0 — PIT guard invariant
